description: Noise proxy profile derived from Doctor EPSC peak amplitude measurements. EPSC peak current CV is used as a proxy for conductance-domain D2D/C2C noise. This is a proxy, not a direct hardware profile.
proxy_limitations: EPSC peak amplitude is a current measurement, not conductance. Multiple factors (voltage, kinetics, single-ended read) cause current-domain CV to overstate conductance-domain CV.
HAT noise model uses differential read (G_pos - G_neg) which rejects common-mode noise not captured in single-ended EPSC.
EPSC measurements at ms timescale may include synaptic noise sources absent in fast analog memory read.

sigma_c2c.description: Cycle-to-cycle noise (fraction of G_range). Proxy: detrended within-device CV of EPSC peak amplitude.
sigma_c2c.discount_rationale: Current-domain CV overstates conductance-domain CV (see proxy_limitations)

sigma_d2d.description: Device-to-device noise (fraction of G_range). Proxy: between-device CV of mean EPSC peak amplitude.
sigma_d2d.discount_rationale: Current-domain CV overstates conductance-domain CV (see proxy_limitations)
